---
name: '🚀 Feature Request'
about: Suggest a new feature, integration, or enhancement for SOC Toolkit
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or threat intelligence provider integration you are proposing.

## 💡 Problem Statement / Use Case
Is your feature request related to a specific SOC workflow or analyst pain point? (e.g. "When triageing SIEM alerts, I need to...")

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or CLI syntax you'd like to see added.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, API documentation links, or screenshots about the feature request here.
